title: Fix DIDNOTCONVERGE in event triggering change (#6932 effect)

features.name: combinational wire from clocked registers in same always block
features.description: Code should include a combinational wire that is derived from register values, where those registers are also assigned via non-blocking assignments inside the same clocked always block that uses the wire in a conditional
features.snippet:
wire [w-1:0] guess2 = acc2 + bit2 + ((acc << bitl) << 1);
always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
  if (reset) begin acc <= 0; acc2 <= 0; end
  else if (guess2 <= x) begin acc <= guess; acc2 <= guess2; end
end

features.name: parameter-driven localparam in width specification
features.description: Code should include a localparam that is computed from a parameter and used in wire width specifications

features.name: async reset with multiple nonblocking assignments in clocked always
features.description: Code should include a clocked always block with asynchronous reset that performs multiple non-blocking assignments to registers

features.name: variable shift in combinational expression
features.description: Code should include a combinational wire computed using shift operators where the shift amount is a register value
features.snippet:
wire [w-1:0] guess2 = acc2 + bit2 + ((acc << bitl) << 1);
wire [w-1:0] bit2 = 1 << (bitl << 1);

features.name: synthesis attribute on procedural block
features.description: Code should include a synthesis attribute applied to a clocked always block
features.snippet:
(* ivl_synthesis_on *)
always @(posedge clk or posedge reset)
  if (reset) begin end
  else begin end
